title: Cuemath is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Cuemath is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Cuemath, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!
